loading_messages: Defend your Crownhall at all costs!
Building a 'Wood Upgrade' building will make nearby buildings' health regenerate faster.
Building a 'Stone Upgrade' building will increase the health of nearby buildings.
Building an 'Iron Upgrade' building will add a spiky, damaging perimeter to nearby buildings.
Buildings will regenerate health slowly if they haven't taken damage recently.
If you're lost, run towards the crown icon near the edge of your screen to find your way back home.
If your enemy has built walls or towers, try building a Trebuchet!
If you're out of Beds then build more 'Villager Resource' buildings.
If you're out of Wood then build more 'Wood Resource' buildings near trees.
If you're out of Stone then build more 'Stone Resource' buildings on Stone.
If you're out of Iron then build more 'Iron Resource' buildings on Iron.
If you're out of Diamonds then build more 'Iron Resource' buildings on Diamonds.
BADGERCON 2018 was held in Stockholm.
Mob Spawners must be built on Spawner Foundations.
Hold (RT or Left Mouse) to auto attack nearby enemies using the Bow and Sword.
Hold (A or spacebar) to perform a charged jump; Charged jumps are useful for getting onto higher ledges.
If your Mobs are having a hard time getting where they're going, try using the terraforming tools to help them.
Use potions on yourself, friends or enemies to gain advantages in combat!
Collect Glowstone Dust and Emeralds to spend on Mob Spawners, Spawner Foundations, Placeable Buffs, and the Trebuchet.
Placeable Buffs enhance Mobs and Mob Spawners.
Use a 'Mob Lure' to gather nearby team Mobs into a specific area.
Placeable Buffs are powerful but fragile - protect them.
Don't fall into the pit!
Aim Mob Spawners toward your enemies.
If you can't build a building, it might be because you don't have enough resources! You can use the /getallresources cheat for now...
When your buildings flash red it means they are under attack. Defend them!
When placing upgrade buildings only highlighted buildings will be upgraded.
When placing new buildings near existing upgrade buildings ensure they are within the upgrade building's area of affect to gain the upgrade.
Build 'Archer Towers', 'Walls', 'Gates', and 'Golem Factories' to defend your village.
Build the 'Spawner Shop' to unlock the different Mob Spawners and the Spawner Foundations.
Build the 'Placeables Shop' to unlock the Placeable Buffs and Trebuchet.
